title: Portuguese Vegetarian Lasagna
description: A rich and satisfying vegetarian lasagna inspired by Portuguese flavors, featuring layers of creamy cheese and tender vegetables.
instructions: Cook the indulgent lasagna noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the roasted eggplant and sauté for 3-4 minutes.
Add the umami-rich tomato sauce and stir to combine.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and let cook for 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the Portuguese-style cheese blend and chopped fresh basil.
In a 9x13-inch baking dish, create a thin layer of the tomato sauce.
Arrange 4 cooked lasagna noodles on top of the sauce.
Spread half of the cheese blend over the noodles.
Repeat the layers, starting with the noodles, then the sauce, and finally the remaining cheese blend.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
